label: Nullseal Stores
description: Nullseal Stores serves as a fortified warehousing chamber embedded within Cyrenth Bastion-City’s internal logistics grid, its exterior walls cast in void-black adamantine-faced ferrocrete. The interior spans a high-bayed hall of numbered racks and pallet cradles, arranged along painted lanes that align with sealed transit corridors and armored loading locks. Auspex tally-plates and lumen strips throw harsh, clinical light across dustless floors, while filtration vents and pressure gaskets enforce quarantine-grade containment. Bulkhead partitions, stamped with munitorum cipherwork and hazard sigils, divide the space into segregated bays for ration stock, spare components, and void-weathered salvage.
